##RRUFFID=R141001
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Zn_6_Mn^2+^_9_Sb^5+^_2_O_12_(SiO_4_)_4_
##LOCALITY=1500 foot level, Sterling mine, Sterling Hill, Ogdensburg, Franklin Mining District, Sussex County, New Jersey, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Thin brown or grey platy crystals, associated with yellow adelite. Twinned by a 2-fold around (001). Previously published structure is probably incorrect.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R141001
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
